reviews.comment:
Muy agradable la atención y educados pero el despacho de combustible podría agilizarse colas sobre av beiro estacionado esperando ser atendido

(Translated by Google)
The service was very pleasant and polite, but the fuel dispensing could be expedited; there were queues on Av. Beiro with people parked and waiting to be served.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlcHZISW9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención! Le piden permiso a 1 pie para mover otro. Siempre hay colas interminables!!! A cualquier hora , un caos. Cero servicio. Y encima a la mañana tiene 1 solo personal que se queda parado al lado de cada carga . Hoy 2022 podés cargar en 2 surtidores a la vez. Pues no, el empleado se queda en la carga de cada auto!!! Coloca la manguera y ahí se queda! Increíble!!!😡 Y lo hace con cada auto!

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible! They ask permission from one person to move another. There are always endless lines!!! It's chaos at any time of day. Zero service. And to top it off, in the morning there's only one employee who just stands next to each pump. In 2022, you can fill up at two pumps at the same time. But no, the employee stays with each car's pump!!! He attaches the nozzle and just stands there! Unbelievable!!! 😡 And he does it with every single car!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNleEpycGx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Se puede sacar la licencia de conducir internacional en el momento. Solo se necesita 2 fotos carnet, una copia de DNI, otra de la licencia y los originales.

(Translated by Google)
You can get an international driving permit on the spot. You only need two passport photos, a copy of your ID, a copy of your driver's license, and the original documents.
